title: Unblock Indicator - Infoblox Cloud
content:
This playbook unblocks the given IP or domain by adding it to the given allow type custom list of the Infoblox Cloud platform.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Infoblox Inc. pack (InfobloxBloxOne, partner-supported).

Inputs — ip_addresses: The IP addresses to unblock.; domains: The domains to unblock.; custom_list_name: Specify the name of the custom list to add the given IP addresses or domains to. Default is "Default Allow".; custom_list_type: Specify the type of the custom list to add the given IP addresses or domains to. Possible values are: default_allow, custom_list, threat_insight, threat_insight_nde. Default is "default_allow"..

Integrations/scripts used: infobloxcloud-customlist-indicator-remove, infobloxcloud-unblock-domain, infobloxcloud-unblock-ip.
